title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Cartoon flat illustration, bright warm color palette, humorous and fun, social media science article style, non-photorealistic, trendy internet vibe. Scene: A fun split screen comparison: left side shows a cartoon stand-up comedian (labeled 'A-Roll 逗哏主角') holding a microphone talking on stage, right side shows a whole team of tiny cartoon support characters (labeled 'B-Roll 捧哏补场'): one holding a clapperboard, one holding a cutting board with tomato, one holding a coffee cup, one holding a keyboard, one holding a cat, all peeking from behind the curtain helping the show. Big bold Chinese text at the top: 'A-Roll vs B-Roll', small Chinese labels under each side. 16:9 aspect ratio, clean light cream background, soft orange and blue accent colors, cute and playful, no realistic details.
